# SecExternalItemType.itemTypeAggregate

**Case**

Indicates a set of certificates or certificates and private keys.

## Declaration

```swift
case itemTypeAggregate
```

## Discussion

Possible values include [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecExternalFormat/formatPKCS7], [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecExternalFormat/formatPKCS12], or [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecExternalFormat/formatPEMSequence] formats (see [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecExternalFormat]).
title: SecExternalItemType.itemTypeAggregate
